2194740.name: 1v1 Me
2194740.description:
1v1 Me is a minimalist Arena Fighter and Battle Royale that is very easy to learn, but difficult to master.

Rounds of 1v1 Me begin with your opponent on the opposite end of a large, dark arena. There are 5 maps, each emphasizing different playstyles. Kill your opponent to win a round. The first to win 3 rounds wins the game!

Games of 1v1 Me can be as short as 3 minutes to a max of 15, making it the perfect game when you're short on time or to quickly settle petty disputes with friends like "Who's the better player?" or "Who's buying pizza tonight?"

Your creativity is your only limit in combat. Armed with a sword, a gun, and blinding speed, combine your abilities to find success on the battlefield.

Utilize mind games, conditioning, and create fear in your opponent to catch them off guard. Keeping a clear mind is critical to your survival.
2194740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
